rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. The first line of the header. gemini-flash incorrectly combined this with the next line and had minor transcription errors ('Compatus' instead of 'Computus', 'Novis' instead of 'Novris').
Selected gpt-5-mini's structure for this second header line, which gemini-flash incorrectly merged with the first. Corrected 'revolution' to 'revolutum' based on direct image reading.
Selected gemini-flash's description 'Annuaragia recepta.' which better matches the image's script for the 'g'. gpt-5-mini read 'Annuaria'. gemini-flash's note referencing 'Amcravia' was confusing.

rows.notes: Consensus on Pounds (264) and Shillings (10). For pence, visual verification clearly shows '11' followed by a '1/4' fraction symbol. gpt-5-mini read '1' pence and '0.25' fraction. gemini-flash read '11' pence and '0.75' fraction. Overrode both to '11' pence and '0.25' fraction based on direct image reading.
